extracted_json.title: Interactions with the TAs

blocks.text: If you have any issues related to the course. (e.g., fall ill, grading concern, ....)
please send e-mail to, Fariha Lateef (flateef@ucsc.edu)
Be sure to put an appropriate header in your message :  TIM 172A .....
Correcting your mistakes in HWs. & Midterm: Re - submission policy:

items.text: After you submission is graded, you can correct your mistakes, and re-submit, for partial credit: upto 60% of your lost grade
Work submitted at the end of the quarter (last HW set; final exam) cannot be re-submitted.

extracted_json.summary_topic_line: Course logistics: how to contact TAs/instructor and the homework/midterm re-submission policy.
extracted_json.summary_gist: Students with course issues (illness, grading concerns) should email TA Fariha Lateef and cc the instructor, using a clear "TIM 172A" subject header. The re-submission policy allows correcting graded, on-time submissions for partial credit (up to 60% of lost grade), but end-of-quarter work (the last HW set and final exam) cannot be re-submitted.

transcription:
Interactions with the TAs:

If you have any issues related to the course.
(e.g., fall ill, grading concern, ....)

please send e-mail to,
    Fariha Lateef (flateef@ucsc.edu)

cc to the instructor (sdesa@ucsc.edu)

Be sure to put an appropriate header in your
message :  TIM 172A .....

Correcting your mistakes in HWs.& Midterm:
Re - submission policy:

1. You have to submit (on-time)

2. After you submission is graded,
   you can correct your mistakes, and
   re-submit, for partial credit: upto 60%
   of your lost grade

3. Work submitted at the end of the
   quarter (last HW set; final exam)
   cannot be re-submitted.
